message:
feat(server,service): replace Instant::now() with injectable Time sources

Eliminates ambient time dependencies from connection management, DNS
discovery, and load balancing, enabling deterministic testing.

ConnectionManager:
- Add with_time_getter() constructor accepting fn() -> Time
- Replace Instant::now() in accept() with injectable time source
- ConnectionInfo.connected_at now uses Time instead of std::time::Instant
- Add deterministic test helpers (AtomicU64-based test clock)

DnsServiceDiscovery:
- DnsDiscoveryConfig gains time_getter field and with_time_getter() builder
- needs_resolve() takes Time parameter, uses duration_since() arithmetic
- poll_discover() calls configured time source instead of Instant::now()
- Add wall_clock_now() and duration_to_nanos() helper functions

LoadBalancer:
- Add readiness-aware backend selection: iterates candidates on strategy
  miss to find first ready backend via poll_service_ready_once()
- New NoReadyBackends error variant for when backends exist but none ready
- Add noop_waker() helper for synchronous readiness probing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
